## BaseKeyboardNavigation.eventsForDirectionLimit property

An [EventsForDirectionLimit](./x-components.eventsfordirectionlimit.md) to emit when the user is already at the furthest element in a direction and tries to keep going on the same direction.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
protected eventsForDirectionLimit: Partial<EventsForDirectionLimit>;
```
